mechanism: Inhibits ABL, FLT3, VEGFR and other kinases to block proliferative signaling
additional_notes: Approved for CML/Ph+ ALL; potent in FLT3-ITD AML lines including MOLM-13/MV4-11

mechanism: Inhibits RAF kinases, FLT3, and VEGFR to suppress MAPK and pro-angiogenic signaling
additional_notes: Approved for RCC/HCC; active in FLT3-ITD AML

mechanism: Inhibits FLT3, PDGFR, VEGFR and related kinases to reduce survival signaling
additional_notes: Approved for RCC/GIST; activity in FLT3-ITD AML lines

mechanism: Primarily inhibits VEGFR; exhibits off-target FLT3 inhibition in AML models
additional_notes: Approved for RCC; reported activity in FLT3-ITD AML lines

mechanism: Broad kinase inhibition including FLT3, VEGFR, and others
additional_notes: Approved for CRC/GIST/HCC; AML preclinical activity reported

mechanism: Inhibits VEGFR and RET with reported FLT3 activity
additional_notes: Approved for medullary thyroid cancer; activity in FLT3-ITD AML cells

mechanism: Inhibits VEGFR, PDGFR, and other kinases to suppress pro-survival pathways
additional_notes: Approved for RCC/STS; AML cell line activity reported in repurposing datasets

mechanism: Reversibly inhibits the 20S proteasome, inducing proteotoxic stress and apoptosis
additional_notes: Approved for MM/MCL; MOLM-13 sensitivity reported

mechanism: Irreversibly inhibits the 20S proteasome, blocking protein degradation
additional_notes: Approved for MM; AML line activity reported

mechanism: Oral reversible 20S proteasome inhibitor causing accumulation of misfolded proteins
additional_notes: Approved for MM; AML preclinical activity in datasets

mechanism: Inhibits class I/II HDACs, altering gene expression and inducing apoptosis
additional_notes: Approved for MM; potent across AML lines including MOLM-13

mechanism: Inhibits HDACs to increase histone acetylation and pro-apoptotic transcription
additional_notes: Approved for CTCL; also known as SAHA

mechanism: Blocks exportin-1 (XPO1), retaining tumor suppressor proteins in the nucleus
additional_notes: Approved for MM/DLBCL; active in many AML lines

mechanism: Inhibits mTORC1 to reduce protein synthesis and cell growth
additional_notes: Approved for RCC and TSC; AML mTOR pathway activity reported

mechanism: Inhibits mTORC1 signaling leading to reduced proliferation
additional_notes: Approved for RCC; AML preclinical activity reported

mechanism: Inhibits MEK1/2 to block MAPK/ERK signaling
additional_notes: Approved for melanoma; stronger effects in RAS/FLT3 contexts and combinations

mechanism: Inhibits MEK1/2 to suppress MAPK pathway signaling
additional_notes: Approved for melanoma; combination-active with FLT3/BCL2 inhibitors in AML studies

mechanism: Inhibits thioredoxin reductase, increasing oxidative stress and inducing apoptosis
additional_notes: Approved for rheumatoid arthritis; AML activity including MOLM-13

mechanism: Inhibits mitochondrial protein synthesis, impairing oxidative phosphorylation
additional_notes: Targets leukemia stem/progenitor cells; AML line activity reported

mechanism: Inhibits Bruton’s tyrosine kinase (BTK) with additional off-target kinases
additional_notes: Approved for CLL/MCL; variable AML activity with context-dependent sensitivity
